error.title: That didn't work.
error.body: We couldn't upload your material. Try again — if it keeps failing, check your connection.

insufficient_credits.title: Out of credits for now.
insufficient_credits.body: You've used up the credits for this period. An adult can top up in settings, or wait for the next period.

async.title: Connection lost
async.body: The connection dropped before LearnBuddy finished. This material was probably not processed — check your materials list. If it shows an error, remove it and scan it again.
